_doc: PROVISIONAL forward rule for substrate #10 (Kalshi FLB), Phase 2 — DOCUMENTED, NOT frozen.
Loaded via `paper_trader.py --rule-spec research/forward_rule.json`; unknown keys (this _doc)
are ignored by RuleSpec.from_dict. This file does NOT modify the frozen design doc.
WHY IT EXISTS: the frozen signals.strategy.DEFAULT_RULE_SPEC lists 'weather' and 'climate'
as separate categories, but Kalshi's actual category string is the single 'Climate and
Weather' -> the literal DEFAULT set matches NO weather markets. It also omits the non-MVE
categories 'elections', 'entertainment', 'commodities', etc. that exist live on the host.
This rule corrects the category set to Kalshi's ACTUAL non-MVE category strings (observed
live via /events) so the non-MVE classic-FLB universe is admitted.
WHAT IS UNCHANGED (and must stay so): the FLB bucket bands (<=15c fade -> NO; >=85c back ->
YES) are FROZEN by design sections 4/5 and are copied verbatim from DEFAULT_RULE_SPEC. This
rule does NOT re-bucket, change entry lead, or alter stake (design section 14 hard rules).
MVE EXCLUSION: 'exotics' is deliberately absent from `categories` -> MVE markets stay
excluded (design section 16: never pool MVE with classic-FLB markets). Use this rule with
`--source events` so place() actually reaches the non-MVE universe; the legacy `--source
markets` feed is 100% MVE on the free host and would journal nothing under this rule.
TIME-TO-CLOSE CAP: max_days_to_close=45 — only enter markets resolving within ~45 days.
The live /events universe is 94% long-dated (median close ~2030; some 2099). Without the
cap the record fills with multi-year longshots that never resolve in a useful window and
whose low price is mostly rational time-value, not FLB. The cap targets near-term markets
where FLB is a genuine bias and lets the 200-resolved target accrue in weeks, not years.
STATUS: PROVISIONAL (provisional=true). It is a hypothesis-derived rule, NOT a Phase 1
survivor-derived rule (Phase 1 was INCONCLUSIVE/MVE-only — research/PHASE1_VERDICT.md).
Re-freeze to the survivor cell once the forward record or a richer-data Phase 1 confirms one.
name: provisional-FLB-forward-v1-nonMVE
